metadata.description: Custom Claude plugins built at ideas42, grouped by craft

plugins.name: brand-systems
plugins.description: Brand rules for ideas42, Year Up, Calbright, Bottom Line, and SBNC/Navvy artifacts.

plugins.name: claude-ops
plugins.description: Claude workspace operations: project setup, file organizing, memory management, scheduling, plugin and skill tooling, and structured review workflows.

plugins.name: connector-automation
plugins.description: Optional connector-dependent automation wrappers for Figma, Miro, Notion, and MCP-building work.

plugins.name: deliverables
plugins.description: Produce polished deliverables: HTML artifacts and dashboards, document co-authoring, visual design foundations, themes, image enhancement, and creative assets.

plugins.name: ideas42-comms
plugins.description: Communicate in the ideas42 voice: internal communications formats, copy editing with ideas42 terminology and style, and learning support for team members.

plugins.name: notion-workflows
plugins.description: Optional Notion-backed capture, meeting prep, research documentation, and spec-to-implementation workflows.

plugins.name: qualitative-research
plugins.description: Qualitative fieldwork used across all IDEAS stages. Journey mapping today; user testing, interview guides, and qualitative synthesis planned — see RECOMMENDATIONS.md.

plugins.name: quantitative-analysis
plugins.description: Quantitative analysis used across all IDEAS stages: data cleaning, sample description, CSV profiling, verification of AI-generated analyses, and visualization.

plugins.name: research-evidence
plugins.description: Collect, synthesize, and compile information: evidence scans, deep research, literature extraction, concept maps, source-backed writing, and multi-agent review.

plugins.name: web-dev
plugins.description: Web development with Figma: design-to-code, design-system rules, React performance, and UI/UX reviews.
